name: Knowledge
summary: Servants of deities of secrets and lore. All Knowledge skills are class skills; bonus to identify creatures and recall lore.

granted_power_l1.name: Lore Keeper
granted_power_l1.summary: Touch a creature; learn information about it as if you'd succeeded a Knowledge check (DC 15 + creature's CR/HD). Usable 3 + Wis modifier times per day.

higher_level_powers.summary: Use scrying as a spell-like ability for caster_level rounds/day.
